reviews.comment:
Fui a hacer un cambio de aceite con turno previo
La atención un desastre, no tenían filtro de aire y solo tenían dos clases de aceite, si quería uno distinto no tenían
Me cobraron la mano de obra para cambiarme el filtro de aceite
El informe me dijeron que me lo mandaban por mail, nunca llego
Me dijeron que no me podían hacer factura y que solo podía abonar en efectivo
Me tuve que quejar para que me hicieran factura A y me cobrarán con débito
Además me rompieron el sistema de apertura del capot
Realmente una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
I went to get an oil change with a pre-arranged appointment.
The service was terrible. They didn't have an air filter and only had two types of oil. If I wanted a different one, they didn't have one.
They charged me for labor to change the oil filter.
They told me they would send me the report by email; it never arrived.
They told me they couldn't invoice me and that I could only pay in cash.
I had to complain so they would issue me an A invoice, and they charged me by debit card.
They also broke the hood release.
It's truly a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMXRTdjRnRRAB
